initial_candidates.sql:
WITH monthly_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y', c.insert_date) AS year,
        ldd.month_name AS month_name,
        COUNT(c.city_id) AS monthly_total
    FROM cities c
    JOIN legislation_date_dim ldd ON c.insert_date = ldd.date
    WHERE strftime('%Y', c.insert_date) IN ('2021', '2022', '2023')
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y', c.insert_date), ldd.month_name
),
yearly_monthly_with_running AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        month_name,
        monthly_total,
        SUM(monthly_total) OVER (
            PARTITION BY month_name 
            ORDER BY year 
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS cumulative_running_total
    FROM monthly_counts
),
year_over_year AS (
    SELECT 
        ymr.year,
        ymr.month_name,
        ymr.monthly_total,
        ymr.cumulative_running_total,
        LAG(ymr.monthly_total) OVER (PARTITION BY ymr.month_name ORDER BY ymr.year) AS prev_year_monthly_total,
        LAG(ymr.cumulative_running_total) OVER (PARTITION BY ymr.month_name ORDER BY ymr.year) AS prev_year_cumulative_running_total
    FROM yearly_monthly_with_running ymr
)
SELECT 
    year,
    month_name,
    monthly_total,
    cumulative_running_total,
    CASE 
        WHEN prev_year_monthly_total IS NULL OR prev_year_monthly_total = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND((monthly_total - prev_year_monthly_total) * 100.0 / prev_year_monthly_total, 2)
    END AS monthly_yoy_growth_pct,
    CASE 
        WHEN prev_year_cumulative_running_total IS NULL OR prev_year_cumulative_running_total = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND((cumulative_running_total - prev_year_cumulative_running_total) * 100.0 / prev_year_cumulative_running_total, 2)
    END AS cumulative_yoy_growth_pct
FROM year_over_year
WHERE year IN ('2022', '2023')
ORDER BY year ASC, month_name ASC;

WITH monthly_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y', c.insert_date) AS year,
        ldd.month_name,
        COUNT(c.city_id) AS monthly_total
    FROM cities c
    JOIN legislation_date_dim ldd ON c.insert_date = ldd.date
    WHERE strftime('%Y', c.insert_date) IN ('2021', '2022', '2023')
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y', c.insert_date), ldd.month_name
),
year_month_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        month_name,
        monthly_total,
        SUM(monthly_total) OVER (
            PARTITION BY month_name 
            ORDER BY year 
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS cumulative_running_total
    FROM monthly_counts
),
year_over_year AS (
    SELECT 
        ymt.year,
        ymt.month_name,
        ymt.monthly_total,
        ymt.cumulative_running_total,
        LAG(ymt.monthly_total) OVER (PARTITION BY ymt.month_name ORDER BY ymt.year) AS prev_monthly_total,
        LAG(ymt.cumulative_running_total) OVER (PARTITION BY ymt.month_name ORDER BY ymt.year) AS prev_cumulative_running_total
    FROM year_month_totals ymt
)
SELECT 
    year,
    month_name,
    monthly_total,
    cumulative_running_total,
    CASE 
        WHEN prev_monthly_total IS NULL OR prev_monthly_total = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND((monthly_total - prev_monthly_total) * 100.0 / prev_monthly_total, 2)
    END AS monthly_growth_pct,
    CASE 
        WHEN prev_cumulative_running_total IS NULL OR prev_cumulative_running_total = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND((cumulative_running_total - prev_cumulative_running_total) * 100.0 / prev_cumulative_running_total, 2)
    END AS cumulative_growth_pct
FROM year_over_year
WHERE year IN ('2022', '2023')
ORDER BY year, month_name;

WITH monthly_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y', c.insert_date) AS year,
        l.month_name AS month_name,
        COUNT(c.city_id) AS monthly_total
    FROM cities c
    JOIN legislation_date_dim l ON c.insert_date = l.date
    WHERE strftime('%Y', c.insert_date) IN ('2021', '2022', '2023')
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y', c.insert_date), l.month_name
),
running_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        month_name,
        monthly_total,
        SUM(monthly_total) OVER (
            PARTITION BY month_name 
            ORDER BY year 
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS cumulative_running_total
    FROM monthly_counts
),
yoy_growth AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        month_name,
        monthly_total,
        cumulative_running_total,
        LAG(monthly_total) OVER (PARTITION BY month_name ORDER BY year) AS prev_monthly_total,
        LAG(cumulative_running_total) OVER (PARTITION BY month_name ORDER BY year) AS prev_cumulative_running_total
    FROM running_totals
)
SELECT 
    year,
    month_name,
    monthly_total,
    cumulative_running_total,
    CASE 
        WHEN prev_monthly_total IS NULL OR prev_monthly_total = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND((monthly_total - prev_monthly_total) * 100.0 / prev_monthly_total, 2)
    END AS monthly_yoy_growth_pct,
    CASE 
        WHEN prev_cumulative_running_total IS NULL OR prev_cumulative_running_total = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND((cumulative_running_total - prev_cumulative_running_total) * 100.0 / prev_cumulative_running_total, 2)
    END AS cumulative_yoy_growth_pct
FROM yoy_growth
WHERE year IN ('2022', '2023')
ORDER BY year ASC, month_name ASC;
